Localization.Description: A user opened a Microsoft Office document with a macro

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} started the Microsoft Office process {subject.process.name} and opened the document "{object.name}" with a macro on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} started the Microsoft Office process {subject.process.name} and opened the document with a macro on host {event_src.host}
